channel.title: appengine on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in appengine on IT notes

item.title: appengine cost > 150/s requests
item.description: Between $5 and $7 USD per day will cost to host in appengine a tiny go application, with an average of 150 request/second, incoming bandwidth > 7GB and outgoing bandwidth < 1GB. close to $25 per month, including the network internet egress Sumary:
